description: Epic 1 — Governed API Contract & DTO Boundary: versioned endpoints, SpringDoc, DTO layer, Problem+JSON

userStories.title: Spring Boot 2.7.x Upgrade
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the project upgraded from Spring Boot 2.3.0 to 2.7.x so that SpringDoc OpenAPI 2.x, Spring Security 5.8, and Testcontainers integration are available.
acceptanceCriteria: Root pom.xml declares spring-boot.version=2.7.x and spring-cloud.version=2021.x
All three modules build: microservice-spring-boot, microservice-spring-data, gateway-service
Springfox removed from microservice-spring-boot POM, replaced with SpringDoc OpenAPI 2.x
mvn package -DskipTests passes on all modules
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Upgraded to Spring Boot 2.7.14, Spring Cloud 2021.0.9 (Jubilee - the line compatible with Boot 2.7; 2022.0.x requires Boot 3.x), Spring Cloud BOM imported for transitive version management, springfox replaced with SpringDoc 1.7.0 (springdoc-openapi-ui artifact; 2.x requires Boot 3.x), spring-cloud-starter-kubernetes-config renamed to spring-cloud-starter-kubernetes-client-config, build verified end-to-end with mvn package -DskipTests across all 3 modules

userStories.title: DTO Boundary — ProductRequestDto and ProductResponseDto
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a strict DTO layer on the Products service so that internal Product entity is never exposed in API request binding or responses.
acceptanceCriteria: ProductRequestDto created with fields: name, id (UUID), description, price — no entity fields exposed
ProductResponseDto created with static fromEntity(Product) factory method
ProductController uses ProductRequestDto for @RequestBody (not Product entity)
ProductController returns ProductResponseDto (not Product entity)
Unit test: ProductControllerTest validates DTO binding and response shape
mvn test -pl microservice-spring-boot passes
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Created ProductRequestDto and ProductResponseDto, updated ProductController to use DTOs, updated all tests

userStories.title: SpringDoc OpenAPI 3.1 spec — Products service
userStories.description: As an API consumer, I want a machine-readable OpenAPI 3.1 spec at /v3/api-docs on the Products service so I can generate clients and explore the API.
acceptanceCriteria: springdoc-openapi-ui added to microservice-spring-boot pom.xml
Springfox dependency fully removed
GET /v3/api-docs returns valid OpenAPI 3.1 JSON
GET /swagger-ui.html renders Swagger UI with all product endpoints
All endpoints annotated with @Operation and @ApiResponse
mvn test -pl microservice-spring-boot passes
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Added SpringDoc OpenAPI annotations to all endpoints, configured application.yml with OpenAPI settings, replaced SwaggerConfig with comments

userStories.title: Global Problem+JSON error handler — Products service
userStories.description: As an API consumer, I want all error responses in RFC 7807 Problem+JSON format so I can handle errors consistently.
acceptanceCriteria: ProblemResponse class created with fields: type, title, status, detail, traceId
GlobalExceptionHandler @ControllerAdvice created handling: ResourceNotFoundException (404), MethodArgumentNotValidException (400), generic Exception (500)
All handlers return ProblemResponse as ResponseEntity body
TraceIdFilter sets MDC key traceId from X-Trace-Id header or generated UUID
traceId included in every ProblemResponse
Unit test: GlobalExceptionHandlerTest covers all handled exception types
mvn test -pl microservice-spring-boot passes
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Created ProblemResponse, GlobalExceptionHandler, TraceIdFilter, ResourceNotFoundException, created comprehensive tests

userStories.title: Bean validation at DTO boundary — Products service
userStories.description: As the system, I want invalid API requests rejected at the controller boundary with a descriptive 400 error so internal code never processes invalid data.
acceptanceCriteria: ProductRequestDto annotated: @NotBlank on name, @NotNull on id, @NotBlank on description, @NotNull @Positive on price
ProductController POST /api/products/add annotated with @Valid
Invalid request returns 400 ProblemResponse with field-level error detail
Unit test: ProductControllerTest validates 400 response for missing name, null id, null price
mvn test -pl microservice-spring-boot passes
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Added validation annotations to ProductRequestDto, added @Valid to controller, created comprehensive validation tests
